services.title: AWS query
services.summary: Diff VPC, EC2, ECS, S3, and EBS vs config; optional --import --yes (JSON on stdout).

services.title: AWS deploy
services.summary: Plan resources, estimate monthly cost, confirm, then create managed infrastructure.

services.title: AWS maintain
services.summary: Reconcile drift; billable creates require cost confirmation; optional --prune.

services.title: AWS teardown
services.summary: Destroy managed resources by --resource or --all (--yes required non-interactive).

next_steps: Run `hdc run infrastructure aws query --` after deploy or maintain.
Review the Cost estimate section in the operation report before recurring charges accrue.
